def negative_readlines_then_iterate():
    rule_id = "readlines_then_iterate"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "readlines() materializes the whole file before line-by-line iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
